title: DNF Duel

notes:
Comes from Epic Store. 


1. Opens a tab in firefox to connect to Epic Online Services.
2. Black screen. Doesn't crash. Mouse cursor on screen. 
3. If click, then cursor disappears. 
4. Can ALT+F4 to exit. Nothing else seems to respond.

Also tested with Proton GE 8.25 for the same result.
